name_en: 【Top Grade】🔥 447632 New Plaid Series continues to boldly explore the brand's classic symbol elements. As a member of the GG Marmont elite handbag collection, it creates a unique geometric style design. Model 447632 features boutique-quality soft natural grain full-grain leather and high-end smooth glossy vintage silver hardware.
